---
name: "♻️ Refactor / Tech Debt"
about: Propose code improvements or technical debt cleanup
title: "[REFACTOR] "
labels: tech-debt, enhancement
---

## 🔍 Area of Refactor

Which module/package/component needs attention? (e.g., `src/renderer/map-engine`)

## 🧱 Current Implementation

Briefly describe how it's currently working and why it's a candidate for refactoring.

## 🚀 Proposed Change

What is the new approach? (e.g., "Switching from Prop-drilling to Context API" or "Optimizing the A* pathfinding loop").

## ✅ Expected Benefits

- [ ] Improved Performance
- [ ] Better Readability / Maintainability
- [ ] Reduced Bundle Size
- [ ] Increased Test Coverage

## ⚠️ Potential Breaking Changes

Will this affect any public APIs or existing map save files?
